message:
audit: batch 475 — pool.rs cascade logic verified SOUND

sync/pool.rs (4255L): WaiterCleanup cascade logic verified — after
remove(p), waiters[available-1] correctly targets first waiter outside
original window. Saturating_sub + available>0 guard prevents underflow.
